summary:
Added Antarctic circumnavigation paragraph to Section 7.1 (Southern Hemisphere Distances). The dome disc rim has circumference ~126,000 km; measured Antarctic circumnavigation at ~70°S is ~13,700 km — a factor-of-8 discrepancy. Paragraph closes aetheric refraction, n(r) compression, and GPS circularity defenses. Quotes dome v22 admission. Insert after third

in section.
